title: delphinium virescens var. vimineum
intro: Delphinium virescens var. vimineum, commonly known as the green-flowered delphinium or climbing delphinium, is a perennial plant belonging to the family Ranunculaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been attributed to the presence of alkaloids and glycosides. The health benefits of Delphinium virescens var. vimineum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable remedy in traditional medicine. Delphinium virescens var. vimineum is often prepared as a tincture, infusion, or decoction, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
